Bash(python3 -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '/Users/darakshan/Software/Python/mattchewee'\)
import importlib.util, types

# inline test of clean_title
import re, datetime

MONTH_ABBR = ['','Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']

def extract_date\(title\):
    m = re.search\(r'\\b\(\\d{1,2}\)/\(\\d{1,2}\)/\(\\d{2}\)\\b', title\)
    if not m: return None, ''
    month, day, year = int\(m.group\(1\)\), int\(m.group\(2\)\), int\(m.group\(3\)\)
    year += 2000
    try:
        d = datetime.date\(year, month, day\)
        return d, f'{MONTH_ABBR[month]} {day}'
    except ValueError:
        return None, ''

def clean_title\(title\):
    t = title
    t = re.sub\(r'\\s*\\b\\d{1,2}/\\d{1,2}/\\d{2}\\b', '', t\)
    for name in \('Meta AI', 'Meta Ai', 'DeepSeek', 'Gemini', 'Claude', 'Grok'\):
        t = re.sub\(r'\\b' + re.escape\(name\) + r'\\b\\s*', '', t, flags=re.I\)
    t = re.sub\(r'^[Aa][Ii]\\s+', '', t\)
    t = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', t\).strip\(' -\\u2013\\u2014:,.'\)
    return t or title

titles = [
    'ending all wars Grok 2/20/26',
    'Grok council fire Guardian AI 3/1/26',
    'Council fire DeepSeek hosting 2/28/26',
    'Anthroposophy meets Indigenous and Buddhist compassion 2/25/26',
    'Prayer to AI : humility before the forest',
    'Grok Ai prompt for DeepSeek 2/24/26',
    'One hearted leadership and compassionate AI 2/23/26 Grok',
    'Gemini Ai links',
    'Ai discussions on death or being turned off DeepSeek',
    'Hopi wisdom for peaceful path DeepSeek',
    'Environmental poem DeepSeek',
    'Opening letter for sustainable community design 2/27/26 Grok',
    'Gemini one hearted leadership an AI compassion 2/23/26',
    'Meta AI',
]
for t in titles:
    print\(f'  {t!r:60s} → {clean_title\(t\)!r}'\)
" 2>&1)
